name: Chocolate Buttermilk Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Generously grease 2 (10-inch) round cake pans. Lightly dust greased pans with a small amount of sifted cocoa powder.
In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy. Add eggs; beat thoroughly. Add vanilla; blend well.
Sift cake flour, baking soda, cocoa powder, and salt together. Add to the creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk, starting and ending with dry ingredients. Beat well after each addition.
Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool cake in pans for 10 minutes before turning out onto wire racks. When cake is cool, spread with Fluffy Filling between the layers and frost top and sides with chocolate frosting.
Fluffy Filling:
1/4 cup Butter
3/4 cup Sifted Powdered Sugar
1 tablespoon Cocoa
1 Egg
In a small bowl, combine butter, powdered sugar, cocoa, and egg. Beat at high speed until filling is fluffy and thick.
